title: Phase 4b: TUI client (ratatui)
description:
Rich terminal UI client for nie using ratatui. Replaces the line-at-a-time REPL in nie-cli with a proper split-pane terminal interface.

Required:
- New crate `nie-tui` (binary) alongside nie-cli
- Layout: left panel = online users list, main panel = scrollable chat log, bottom = input line, status bar = connection/wallet/sync state
- Keybindings: Enter to send, PgUp/PgDn to scroll, Tab to cycle focus, Ctrl-C/Q to quit
- /pay, /balance, /receive slash commands wired through same command dispatcher as nie-cli
- Payment event overlays: modal or inline notification when a payment is received/confirmed
- Mouse support optional (ratatui supports it)
- Shares nie-core transport and all wallet logic with nie-cli — no duplication
- --data-dir, --relay, --network, --lightwalletd flags identical to nie-cli

Architecture:
- ratatui + crossterm backend (crossterm is already in the Rust ecosystem, no C deps)
- Async event loop: tokio select! between crossterm key events and nie-core message channel
- Terminal is restored on panic via a panic hook (crossterm raw mode must be exited cleanly)

Blocking: Phase 1 (chat) is sufficient foundation. MLS and wallet are additive.
